an5.29:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, there are these five benefits of walking meditation. What five?
an5.29:1.2:
One becomes capable of journeys; one becomes capable of striving; one becomes healthy; what one has eaten, drunk, consumed, and tasted is properly digested; the concentration attained through walking meditation is long lasting.
These are the five benefits of walking meditation."
